positive: A minimalist, whimsical illustration of a friendly golden retriever puppy wearing a tiny wizard hat, surrounded by floating celestial elements like crescent moons, stylized stars, and pastel nebula smoke. The dog should have a clear, cheerful silhouette. Use a clean linework style mixed with digital watercolor gradients. Composition must be perfectly centered for apparel printing, utilizing a limited but harmonious color palette of soft blues, sage green, burnt orange, and ivory. The design should look excellent as a repeat print or a singular centered graphic, suitable for screen printing. Isolated on a pure white background, high contrast details, flat vector elements integrated with soft brushwork, crisp edges.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, watermark, signature, text, logos, copyright, bad anatomy, malformed, extra limbs, noise, artifacts, low resolution, busy background, messy details, jpeg compression
